title: Teltonika RUTX08 Industrial Ethernet Router
description: A powerful router based on Linux: LTE modem Teltonika RUTX08. A new generation router that, among other things, offers a gigabit Ethernet interface. It is a robust network solution that includes a VPN, a firewall and enough computing capacity to run custom-designed applications within the RutOS operating system (OpenWrt based on Linux OS) 4 x gigabit ethernet port Remote Administration VPN support Includes RutOS Wide power supply range (9 â 50 V) for easier integration of other devices This robust industrial router is equipped with a quad-core processor along with 256 GB of RAM. Thanks to its high computing power, it is an ideal device for areas where WiFi or cellular connectivity is not required. The device offers a number of VPN services and an advanced firewall, including support for RMS (Teltonika Remote Management System) remote management Static routing, Dynamic routing (BGP, OSPF v2, RIP v1/v2, EIGRP, NHRP) VoIP support DHCP QoS DDNS Internal/external radius server, captive gateway The device allows authentication, includes a configurable firewall, offers a whole range of other security systems - DDOS prevention (protection against SYN flood, SSH / HTTP/HTTPS attack, port scanning - SYN-FIN, SYN-RST, X-mas, NULL flags , FIN scan attacks). Supports VLAN, allows setting mobile data limits, offers web filter and access control Powerful and robust gigabit router suitable for corporate networks. It is powered by the RutOS operating system. It offers numerous security features including VPN, firewall, supports VLAN among others Interface: 4Ã LAN 10/100/1000 Mbps; 1Ã…
